title: German-Style Beef in Pastry
description: A classic German dish featuring tender beef in a rich sauerbraten sauce, wrapped in a flaky pastry crust.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together sauerkraut, caraway seeds, and black pepper.
Add beef to the bowl and toss to coat.
Roll out pastry sheet to a large rectangle.
Transfer beef mixture to one half of the pastry rectangle.
Brush edges with water and fold pastry over the filling.
Press edges to seal and cut a few slits in the top for steam.
Brush pastry with egg wash and bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
